query:
SELECT p.id, p.batchNo, p.poNumber, p.vendorName, p.importedCategoryName, p.importedBrandName, p.categoryId, p.currentStationCode, p.currentStatus, pc.categoryName AS assignedCategoryName, pc.brandName AS assignedBrandName, pc.subtypeCode AS assignedSubtypeCode FROM products p LEFT JOIN product_categories pc ON pc.id = p.categoryId WHERE p.batchNo = '00500025282';
SELECT se.id, se.stationCode, se.eventType, se.businessDate, se.operatorUserId, se.categoryId, se.subtypeCode, se.countForProductivity, psd.id AS detailId, psd.targetConfigId, psd.earnedPoints FROM station_events se INNER JOIN products p ON p.id = se.productId LEFT JOIN productivity_score_details psd ON psd.stationEventId = se.id WHERE p.batchNo = '00500025282' ORDER BY se.id ASC;

SELECT se.id, se.stationCode, se.eventType, se.businessDate, se.operatorUserId, se.categoryId, se.subtypeCode, se.countForProductivity, psd.id AS detailId, psd.targetConfigId, psd.earnedPoints FROM station_events se INNER JOIN products p ON p.id = se.productId LEFT JOIN productivity_score_details psd ON psd.stationEventId = se.id WHERE p.batchNo = '00500025282' ORDER BY se.id ASC;
